sentences.arabic: أَخَذَ طَارِقٌ سَيَّارَةَ الْأُجْرَةِ إِلَى وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tariq je uzeo taksi do centra grada.
sentences.translationEn: Tariq took a taxi to the city center.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ السَّائِقَ عَنِ الْأَمَاكِنِ الْجَمِيلَةِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pitao je vozača o lijepim mjestima u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: He asked the driver about beautiful places in the city.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَهُ السَّائِقُ عَنِ السُّوقِ الْقَدِيمِ وَالْمَتْحَفِ.
sentences.translation: Vozač mu je ispričao o staroj pijaci i muzeju.
sentences.translationEn: The driver told him about the old market and the museum.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ طَارِقٌ السَّائِقَ وَنَزَلَ مِنَ السَّيَّارَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tariq je zahvalio vozaču i izašao iz auta.
sentences.translationEn: Tariq thanked the driver and got out of the car.
